task.title: Repair export pipeline regressions
task.goal: Fix export-script-driven regressions affecting sidebar license display, conflict highlighting, and timeline behavior without breaking the existing graph UI.
constraints: Bootstrap through AgentKit before code changes
success_criteria: Existing broken exports load again through compatibility normalization
Future exports restore array-shaped nodeData and scalar license values

summaries.content: Task bootstrapped through AgentKit pipeline: Fix export-script-driven regressions affecting sidebar license display, conflict highlighting, and timeline behavior without breaking the existing graph UI.
Restored the graph data contract by normalizing object-shaped nodeData and array licenses at load time, and by fixing future exports to emit array nodeData with scalar license fields.

evidence_refs.note: Load-time graph normalization now converts object-shaped nodeData into dense arrays and scalar node fields.
Export script now writes scalar license fields and array-shaped nodeData.json again.
Display-side resolver ignores placeholder license tags and prefers meaningful user-facing license fields.
